name: Punch-Out!! (2009) RPG
description:
Based on the 2009 adaptation on Wii, play a character (existing, oc or yourself) in this boxing game. Train with Doc Louis, go through the circuits and fight every opponents.

In order, there is:

Glass Joe 🇫🇷

Von Kaiser 🇩🇪

Disco Kid 🇺🇲

King Hippo 🇬🇸

Piston Hondo 🇯🇵

Bear Hugger 🇨🇦

Great Tiger 🇮🇳

Don Flamenco 🇪🇸

Aran Ryan 🇮🇪

Soda Popinski🇷🇺

Bald Bull 🇹🇷

Super Macho Man 🇺🇲

Mr. Sandman 🇺🇲

(Donkey Kong 🦍(as a end bonus))

Have either some slices of life or only action, you decide!
creator: Burnt_Chicken_Nugget
